//: Copy to ~/.claude/oh-my-cchud.json (or set OH_MY_CCHUD_CONFIG) to override. Shallow-merged over defaults — omit anything you don't want to change.
//theme: one of: default (Unicode) | nerd (Nerd Font) | ascii (plain). Or set OH_MY_CCHUD_THEME=ascii to preview.
//opt-in: omitted by default; add to a line to enable: cost (flat-rate artifact for Pro/Max; rate is the real signal) · tools (redundant with Claude Code's live UI + lags) · output_style (rarely-changed, user-set, drives no action)
//segments: available: model context rate cost git tools todos agents worktree output_style effort thinking pr status
//status: Claude Code service status (status.claude.com). Self-hides while operational; shows only during an incident. Remove `status` from lines to disable. component = which Statuspage component to watch.
